title: pilosella sphaerocephala
intro: Pilosella sphaerocephala, also known as the round-leaved mouse-ear hawkweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. Pilosella sphaerocephala can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
